ops.body:
# Gate content validation — one predicate, checked at every layer

Empty gate text is invalid training input. A gate sample whose rendered
`gate_text(window)` collapses to bare role markup (`<assistant>\n`) teaches the
gate "empty context ⇒ steer" — the same fire-on-nothing pathology the capture-seam
doc (`c275b631`) fixed for the watcher.

## The single predicate (text-level — do not reintroduce a message-level one)

`cc_steer/rendering.py::gate_text_is_substantive(text)` is the one predicate every
seam shares: `bool(GATE_ROLE_BLOCK.sub("", text).strip())`.
`has_substantive_gate_content(window)` applies it to `gate_text(window)` — the exact
text the export stores and `freeze_eval` checks. **Do not** revert to a message-level
check (`has_substantive_content(watcher_prompt(window))`): it disagreed with the
freeze regex on role-marker-shaped payloads — a preview whose content is literally
`\n\n<assistant>\n` reads non-empty as a message but strips to empty, so the row
passed export and crashed freeze (found by review, fixed in `59d7e3fd`).
`test_rendering.py` pins the two seams' agreement across shapes, role-marker payload
included.

## Where it is enforced (defense in depth — do not bypass any layer)

1. **Sampler generation.** `negatives.py::event_samples` breaks the rewind loop the
   moment a rewound window renders empty (monotonic: a deeper rewind only loses more).
   `context_rebuild.py::positive_gate_samples` filters the same way, so a
   `rebuild-context` pass never *regenerates* empties either.
2. **Store insert choke point.** `store.py::record_gate_samples` drops any empty sample
   of any kind before insert — the single seam every generator flows through.
3. **Export.** `export.py::gate_row` raises `EmptyWatcherPrompt(view="gate")` on an
   empty rendered text, so an empty gate row aborts the export rather than reaching a
   parquet.
4. **Freeze.** `retrain/evalset.py::freeze_eval` calls `gate_text_is_substantive` and
   raises `EmptyEvalContext`.

## The degenerate populations (why this bites)

- **Rewound-past-content positives.** A steering window shaped
  `before=[assistant(empty), user, user, ...]` (leading zero-length assistant turn is a
  turn-boundary artifact). `gate_text` renders only the model-visible context turns
  (the user steer is the excluded label), so the deepest rewinds drop every
  content-bearing user turn and leave only the empty assistant. Offset 0 is never empty
  for a non-quarantined parent, so **no positive event is lost — only the empty tail
  rewinds are trimmed.**
- **Empty-anchor random negatives.** `sample_windows` occasionally anchors on an
  empty-content assistant turn (`before=[assistant(empty)]`, `trigger=None`); content
  lives only in `after`, which gate rendering correctly ignores.
- **Role-marker-only payloads.** A preview whose own content is role-marker lookalikes
  (`\n\n<assistant>\n`); degenerate noise, correctly read as empty by the shared text
  predicate.

## Sampling completion bookkeeping

A session whose random-negative anchors all render empty persists no `random_negative`
row, so it would re-parse every pass forever. `store.negative_sessions()` unions a
`sampled_session` marker (`mark_sessions_sampled`, written per parsed session in
`sample_negatives`) so a parsed-but-all-dropped session counts as done.

## Migration

`cc_steer prune-gate-samples` (`context_rebuild.py::prune_empty_gate_samples`) deletes
existing empties, no transcript re-read (empties are a pure function of stored
`window_json`). `store.prune_gate_samples` scans, classifies, and deletes in one
`BEGIN IMMEDIATE` transaction, so the reported counts reflect exactly the rows removed
even under a concurrent pipeline; idempotent, run with the watch daemon unloaded. First
production run (2026-07-16) pruned 2627 of 17427 (2559 positive_window, 10
hard_negative, 58 random_negative). NOTE: the always-on pipeline runs the *published*
cc-steer, which lacks these guards until a release — so it re-introduces empties until
the fix ships; the export/freeze invariants fail loud when it does. Gate-sample repair
constraints from the round-4 hardening doc (`8fad267f`) still hold — the prune only
adds a delete-empties pass; it does not touch family reconciliation.
